sacm:AssuranceCasePackage.name: Open Autonomy Safety Case
sacm:AssuranceCasePackage.description: A safety case template for autonomous vehicle deployment based on Positive Trust Balance

expression.value: UL 4600 - Standard for Evaluation of Autonomous Products
ISO 21448 - Safety of the Intended Functionality (SOTIF)
ISO/PAS 8800 - Road vehicles Safety and AI
German Ethics Commission Report on Automated Driving

artifact.name: Vehicle Description
artifact.description: Description of vehicle, operations, and stakeholder requirements

artifact.name: SMS Claims
artifact.description: Relevant Safety Management System claims

artifact.name: Safety Advisory Board
artifact.description: Our safety advisory board includes a full set of stakeholder responsibilities

artifact.name: Independent Assessment 13
artifact.description: Results of independent assessment - Transparency assessment results

artifact.name: Independent Assessment 14
artifact.description: Results of independent assessment - Assessor independence verification

artifact.name: Independent Assessment 27
artifact.description: Results of independent assessment - Safety advisory board approval

artifact.name: Independent Assessment 28
artifact.description: Results of independent assessment - Regulatory compliance

artifact.name: Independent Assessment 29
artifact.description: Results of independent assessment - Ethics guidelines compliance

artifact.name: Independent Assessment 30
artifact.description: Results of independent assessment - 14 CFR Part 5 compliance

artifact.name: Independent Assessment 31
artifact.description: Results of independent assessment - UL 4600 continuous improvement

artifact.name: Independent Assessment 32
artifact.description: Results of independent assessment - IATF 16949 conformance

artifact.name: Independent Assessment 61
artifact.description: Results of independent assessment - STPA hazard analysis

artifact.name: Independent Assessment 62
artifact.description: Results of independent assessment - FMVSS conformance

artifact.name: Independent Assessment 63
artifact.description: Results of independent assessment - ISO 26262 conformance

artifact.name: Independent Assessment 64
artifact.description: Results of independent assessment - ISO/PAS 8800 conformance

artifact.name: Independent Assessment 65
artifact.description: Results of independent assessment - ISO 21448 conformance

artifact.name: Independent Assessment 66
artifact.description: Results of independent assessment - ISO 21434 conformance

artifact.name: Independent Assessment 67
artifact.description: Results of independent assessment - ISO 10007 conformance

artifact.name: Independent Assessment 68
artifact.description: Results of independent assessment - SAE AVSC 00004 conformance

artifact.name: Independent Assessment 80
artifact.description: Results of independent assessment - Trip interruption operations

artifact.name: Independent Assessment 81
artifact.description: Results of independent assessment - Post-crash operations

artifact.name: Independent Assessment 82
artifact.description: Results of independent assessment - Remote operations

artifact.name: Independent Assessment 83
artifact.description: Results of independent assessment - First responder interactions

artifact.name: Independent Assessment 84
artifact.description: Results of independent assessment - Safety inspections

artifact.name: Independent Assessment 85
artifact.description: Results of independent assessment - Operational metrics monitoring

artifact.name: Independent Assessment 86
artifact.description: Results of independent assessment - Procedural hazard mitigations

argumentPackage.name: Open Autonomy Safety Case - Main Argument

claim.name: Goal 1
claim.content: The autonomous vehicle is safe enough to deploy.
claim.description: Top-level safety claim for the autonomous vehicle deployment

claim.name: Goal 3
claim.content: The organization is trustworthy.

claim.name: Goal 4
claim.content: The vehicle is safe to operate.

claim.name: Goal 5
claim.content: We operate the vehicle safely.

argumentReasoning.name: Strategy 2
argumentReasoning.description: The argument strategy based on achieving a positive trust balance through organizational trustworthiness, vehicle safety, and safe operations

artifactReference.name: Vehicle Operations Context
artifactReference.description: Description of vehicle, operations, and stakeholder requirements

assertedInference.name: Top-Level Inference
assertedInference.description: The top-level claim is supported by organizational trustworthiness, vehicle safety, and operational safety through positive trust balance

assertedContext.name: Top-Level Context
assertedContext.description: Vehicle and operations context informs the positive trust balance strategy

claim.name: Goal 8
claim.content: We regularly share results of independent safety assessments with stakeholders.

claim.name: Goal 9
claim.content: Assessor independence satisfies requirements of UL 4600.

claim.name: Goal 10
claim.content: SMS safety policies are aligned with stakeholder requirements.
claim.description: Safety Management System policies meet stakeholder needs

claim.name: Goal 11
claim.content: SMS processes are in use.
claim.description: Safety Management System processes are actively implemented

claim.name: Goal 12
claim.content: Our safety case is monitored & improved.
claim.description: Continuous monitoring and improvement of the safety case

claim.name: Goal 21
claim.content: SRCs are approved by our safety advisory board.
claim.description: Safety-related claims approved by safety advisory board

claim.name: Goal 22
claim.content: Our SRCs satisfy regulations in our operational area.

claim.name: Goal 23
claim.content: Our SRCs satisfy report guidelines.
claim.description: Safety-related claims satisfy German Ethics Commission guidelines

claim.name: Goal 24
claim.content: Our SMS conforms with 14 CFR part 5.
claim.description: Safety Management System conformance with aviation SMS standards

claim.name: Goal 25
claim.content: Our safety case is continuously improved in conformance with relevant sections of UL 4600.

claim.name: Goal 26
claim.content: Our organization conforms with IATF 16949.

argumentReasoning.name: Strategy 6
argumentReasoning.description: Argument that transparency through sharing assessments builds stakeholder trust

argumentReasoning.name: Strategy 7
argumentReasoning.content: An SMS is a best practice for managing system safety.
argumentReasoning.description: Argument that a Safety Management System represents best practice

artifactReference.name: Context 15
artifactReference.description: Our safety advisory board includes a full set of stakeholder responsibilities

argumentReasoning.name: Strategy 16
argumentReasoning.description: Argument based on regulatory compliance

argumentReasoning.name: Strategy 17
argumentReasoning.content: Appeal to German Ethics Commission report.
argumentReasoning.description: Argument based on ethical guidelines for automated driving

argumentReasoning.name: Strategy 18
argumentReasoning.description: Argument based on aviation safety management standards

argumentReasoning.name: Strategy 19
argumentReasoning.description: Argument based on autonomous products evaluation standard

argumentReasoning.name: Strategy 20
argumentReasoning.description: Argument based on automotive quality management standard

artifactReference.name: Evidence 13
artifactReference.description: Results of independent assessment - Transparency

artifactReference.name: Evidence 14
artifactReference.description: Results of independent assessment - Assessor independence

artifactReference.name: Evidence 27
artifactReference.description: Results of independent assessment - Safety advisory board

artifactReference.name: Evidence 28
artifactReference.description: Results of independent assessment - Regulatory compliance

artifactReference.name: Evidence 29
artifactReference.description: Results of independent assessment - Ethics guidelines

artifactReference.name: Evidence 30
artifactReference.description: Results of independent assessment - 14 CFR Part 5

artifactReference.name: Evidence 31
artifactReference.description: Results of independent assessment - UL 4600 improvement

artifactReference.name: Evidence 32
artifactReference.description: Results of independent assessment - IATF 16949

assertedInference.name: Transparency Inference
assertedInference.description: Transparency and assessor independence support organizational trustworthiness

assertedInference.name: SMS Inference
assertedInference.description: SMS policies, processes, and monitoring support organizational trustworthiness

assertedInference.name: Advisory Board Approval Inference
assertedInference.description: Safety advisory board approval supports SMS policy alignment

assertedContext.name: Advisory Board Context
assertedContext.description: Safety advisory board context for SRC approval

assertedInference.name: Regulatory Compliance Inference
assertedInference.description: Regulatory compliance supports SMS policy alignment

assertedInference.name: Ethics Guidelines Inference
assertedInference.description: Ethics guidelines compliance supports SMS policy alignment

assertedInference.name: 14 CFR Part 5 Inference
assertedInference.description: 14 CFR Part 5 conformance supports SMS processes

assertedInference.name: UL 4600 Improvement Inference
assertedInference.description: UL 4600 continuous improvement supports safety case monitoring

assertedInference.name: IATF 16949 Inference
assertedInference.description: IATF 16949 conformance supports safety case monitoring

assertedEvidence.name: Transparency Evidence
assertedEvidence.description: Assessment results support transparency claim

assertedEvidence.name: Assessor Independence Evidence
assertedEvidence.description: Assessment results support assessor independence claim

assertedEvidence.name: Advisory Board Approval Evidence
assertedEvidence.description: Assessment results support safety advisory board approval claim

assertedEvidence.name: Regulatory Compliance Evidence
assertedEvidence.description: Assessment results support regulatory compliance claim

assertedEvidence.name: Ethics Guidelines Evidence
assertedEvidence.description: Assessment results support ethics guidelines compliance claim

assertedEvidence.name: 14 CFR Part 5 Evidence
assertedEvidence.description: Assessment results support 14 CFR Part 5 conformance claim

assertedEvidence.name: UL 4600 Improvement Evidence
assertedEvidence.description: Assessment results support UL 4600 continuous improvement claim

assertedEvidence.name: IATF 16949 Evidence
assertedEvidence.description: Assessment results support IATF 16949 conformance claim

claim.name: Goal 37
claim.content: We have analyzed all hazards posed by the vehicle.

claim.name: Goal 38
claim.content: The vehicle conforms with vehicle safety standards.

claim.name: Goal 39
claim.content: The vehicle conforms with functional safety standards.

claim.name: Goal 40
claim.content: The vehicle conforms with AI engineering rigor standards.

claim.name: Goal 41
claim.content: The vehicle's intended functions are safe.

claim.name: Goal 42
claim.content: The vehicle conforms with security standards.

claim.name: Goal 43
claim.content: We follow configuration management standards.

claim.name: Goal 44
claim.content: The vehicle conforms with data recording best practices.

claim.name: Goal 53
claim.content: We completed a hazard analysis according to this standard.
claim.description: Hazard analysis per SAE J3307 STPA

claim.name: Goal 54
claim.content: Our vehicle conforms with FMVSS.
claim.description: Federal Motor Vehicle Safety Standards conformance

claim.name: Goal 55
claim.content: We developed our system according to ISO 26262.

claim.name: Goal 56
claim.content: We developed our system according to ISO/PAS 8800.

claim.name: Goal 57
claim.content: We developed our system according to ISO 21448.

claim.name: Goal 58
claim.content: We developed our system according to ISO 21434.

claim.name: Goal 59
claim.content: We manage these risks according to ISO 10007.

claim.name: Goal 60
claim.content: Our system and operations conform with all recommendations in SAE AVSC 00004.

argumentReasoning.name: Strategy 33
argumentReasoning.content: Appeal to safety hazard analysis standards.
argumentReasoning.description: Argument based on hazard analysis methodologies

argumentReasoning.name: Strategy 34
argumentReasoning.content: Appeal to safety risk mitigation standards.
argumentReasoning.description: Argument based on risk mitigation through standards conformance

argumentReasoning.name: Strategy 35
argumentReasoning.description: Argument based on configuration management standards

argumentReasoning.name: Strategy 36
argumentReasoning.content: Appeal to forensic data recording best practices.
argumentReasoning.description: Argument based on data recording for incident investigation

argumentReasoning.name: Strategy 45
argumentReasoning.description: Argument based on STPA hazard analysis methodology

argumentReasoning.name: Strategy 46
argumentReasoning.description: Argument based on Federal Motor Vehicle Safety Standards

argumentReasoning.name: Strategy 47
argumentReasoning.description: Argument based on functional safety standard

argumentReasoning.name: Strategy 48
argumentReasoning.description: Argument based on AI safety standard

argumentReasoning.name: Strategy 49
argumentReasoning.description: Argument based on SOTIF standard

argumentReasoning.name: Strategy 50
argumentReasoning.description: Argument based on cybersecurity engineering standard

argumentReasoning.name: Strategy 51
argumentReasoning.description: Argument based on configuration management standard

argumentReasoning.name: Strategy 52
argumentReasoning.description: Argument based on data recording standard

artifactReference.name: Evidence 61
artifactReference.description: Results of independent assessment - STPA hazard analysis

artifactReference.name: Evidence 62
artifactReference.description: Results of independent assessment - FMVSS

artifactReference.name: Evidence 63
artifactReference.description: Results of independent assessment - ISO 26262

artifactReference.name: Evidence 64
artifactReference.description: Results of independent assessment - ISO/PAS 8800

artifactReference.name: Evidence 65
artifactReference.description: Results of independent assessment - ISO 21448

artifactReference.name: Evidence 66
artifactReference.description: Results of independent assessment - ISO 21434

artifactReference.name: Evidence 67
artifactReference.description: Results of independent assessment - ISO 10007

artifactReference.name: Evidence 68
artifactReference.description: Results of independent assessment - SAE AVSC 00004

assertedInference.name: Hazard Analysis Inference
assertedInference.description: Hazard analysis supports vehicle safety

assertedInference.name: Risk Mitigation Inference
assertedInference.description: Standards conformance supports vehicle safety through risk mitigation

assertedInference.name: Configuration Management Inference
assertedInference.description: Configuration management supports vehicle safety

assertedInference.name: Data Recording Inference
assertedInference.description: Data recording supports vehicle safety through incident investigation capability

assertedInference.name: STPA Inference
assertedInference.description: STPA hazard analysis supports hazard identification claim

assertedInference.name: FMVSS Inference
assertedInference.description: FMVSS conformance supports vehicle safety standards claim

assertedInference.name: ISO 26262 Inference
assertedInference.description: ISO 26262 development supports functional safety claim

assertedInference.name: ISO/PAS 8800 Inference
assertedInference.description: ISO/PAS 8800 development supports AI engineering rigor claim

assertedInference.name: ISO 21448 Inference
assertedInference.description: ISO 21448 development supports intended functions safety claim

assertedInference.name: ISO 21434 Inference
assertedInference.description: ISO 21434 development supports security standards claim

assertedInference.name: ISO 10007 Inference
assertedInference.description: ISO 10007 risk management supports configuration management claim

assertedInference.name: SAE AVSC 00004 Inference
assertedInference.description: SAE AVSC 00004 conformance supports data recording claim

assertedEvidence.name: STPA Evidence
assertedEvidence.description: Assessment results support STPA hazard analysis claim

assertedEvidence.name: FMVSS Evidence
assertedEvidence.description: Assessment results support FMVSS conformance claim

assertedEvidence.name: ISO 26262 Evidence
assertedEvidence.description: Assessment results support ISO 26262 development claim

assertedEvidence.name: ISO/PAS 8800 Evidence
assertedEvidence.description: Assessment results support ISO/PAS 8800 development claim

assertedEvidence.name: ISO 21448 Evidence
assertedEvidence.description: Assessment results support ISO 21448 development claim

assertedEvidence.name: ISO 21434 Evidence
assertedEvidence.description: Assessment results support ISO 21434 development claim

assertedEvidence.name: ISO 10007 Evidence
assertedEvidence.description: Assessment results support ISO 10007 risk management claim

assertedEvidence.name: SAE AVSC 00004 Evidence
assertedEvidence.description: Assessment results support SAE AVSC 00004 conformance claim

claim.name: Goal 72
claim.content: Our operations support trip interruptions IAW all recommendations in SAE AVSC 00003.
claim.description: Trip interruption operations per SAE AVSC 00003

claim.name: Goal 73
claim.content: Our post-crash operations conform with all recommendations in SAE AVSC-I-05.

claim.name: Goal 74
claim.content: Our remote operations conform with all recommendations in SAE AVSC-I-04.

claim.name: Goal 75
claim.content: Our first responder interactions conform with all recommendations in SAE AVSC-I-01.
claim.description: First responder interaction procedures per SAE AVSC-I-01

claim.name: Goal 76
claim.content: Our safety inspections conform with all recommendations in SAE AVSC-D-03.
claim.description: Safety inspection procedures per SAE AVSC-D-03

claim.name: Goal 77
claim.content: We monitor metrics in operations IAW all recommendations in SAE AVSC 00006.
claim.description: Operational metrics monitoring per SAE AVSC 00006

claim.name: Goal 78
claim.content: Our operating procedures mitigate all hazards without technical mitigations.

argumentReasoning.name: Strategy 69
argumentReasoning.content: Appeal to all relevant operational safety best practices.
argumentReasoning.description: Argument based on operational safety best practices

argumentReasoning.name: Strategy 70
argumentReasoning.description: Argument that operating procedures address residual hazards

argumentReasoning.name: Strategy 71
argumentReasoning.description: Argument based on safety management effectiveness

artifactReference.name: Context 79
artifactReference.description: Relevant SMS claims providing context for operational safety

artifactReference.name: Evidence 80
artifactReference.description: Results of independent assessment - Trip interruptions

artifactReference.name: Evidence 81
artifactReference.description: Results of independent assessment - Post-crash operations

artifactReference.name: Evidence 82
artifactReference.description: Results of independent assessment - Remote operations

artifactReference.name: Evidence 83
artifactReference.description: Results of independent assessment - First responder interactions

artifactReference.name: Evidence 84
artifactReference.description: Results of independent assessment - Safety inspections

artifactReference.name: Evidence 85
artifactReference.description: Results of independent assessment - Metrics monitoring

artifactReference.name: Evidence 86
artifactReference.description: Results of independent assessment - Procedural mitigations

assertedInference.name: Operational Best Practices Inference
assertedInference.description: Operational best practices conformance supports safe vehicle operation

assertedInference.name: Procedural Mitigations Inference
assertedInference.description: Procedural mitigations support safe vehicle operation

assertedContext.name: SMS Context for Safety Management
assertedContext.description: SMS claims provide context for effective safety management strategy

assertedEvidence.name: Trip Interruption Evidence
assertedEvidence.description: Assessment results support trip interruption operations claim

assertedEvidence.name: Post-Crash Evidence
assertedEvidence.description: Assessment results support post-crash operations claim

assertedEvidence.name: Remote Operations Evidence
assertedEvidence.description: Assessment results support remote operations claim

assertedEvidence.name: First Responder Evidence
assertedEvidence.description: Assessment results support first responder interactions claim

assertedEvidence.name: Safety Inspections Evidence
assertedEvidence.description: Assessment results support safety inspections claim

assertedEvidence.name: Metrics Monitoring Evidence
assertedEvidence.description: Assessment results support metrics monitoring claim

assertedEvidence.name: Procedural Mitigations Evidence
assertedEvidence.description: Assessment results support procedural mitigations claim
